Translation companion

Simul

On-device translation

Languages

Reading the active page…

Chrome is showing side panels on the left. Simul works here; to put it on the right, open Chrome Settings → Appearance → Side panel and select “Show on right.”

Preparing a safe, read-only page snapshot…

Read-only approximation. The original page is never modified. Image pixels are shown unchanged; only available labels and captions are translated in this version. Original remote images may reload from their existing source host.

Side-panel placement is controlled globally by Chrome. A separate companion-window mode is planned for later.
